bird.name: Andean gull
bird.summary: The Andean gull (Chroicocephalus serranus) is a species in subfamily Larinae of the family Laridae, the gulls, terns, and skimmers. It is f…

relations.subject: Andean gull
relations.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. "The species is probably vulnerable, with no large populations...breeding areas are in remote high-altitude lakes but many are increasingly subject to agricultural pressure and human disturbance."
relations.object_summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。
